steps.t: Faeron can be found in Viznak's hideout. You should talk to Faeron.
Viznak can be found in his hideout. You should talk to Viznak when you are ready to leave.
Viznak mentioned that the potential allies can be found in a mountain pass to the north-east. You should either walk with Viznak or find the mountain …
The mountain pass in north-east Agarnaith is guarded by Ghai-buri-Sêk. You should attempt to talk to Ghai-buri-Sêk.
Faeron can be found at the mountain pass in north-east Agarnaith. You should talk to Faeron and decide how to proceed.
Faeron can be found at the mountain pass in north-east Agarnaith. You should talk to Faeron.
The Drúedain outside the mountain pass in north-east Agarnaith seem to be willing to talk to you now. You should try to talk to Ghai-buri-Sêk.
